scripts.lint: npx hyperframes lint main-product && npx hyperframes lint product-tour && npx hyperframes lint promo-short
scripts.validate: npx hyperframes validate --timeout 30000 main-product && npx hyperframes validate --timeout 30000 product-tour && npx hyperframes validate --timeout 30000 promo-short
scripts.inspect: npx hyperframes inspect --samples 9 main-product && npx hyperframes inspect --samples 11 product-tour && npx hyperframes inspect --samples 7 promo-short
scripts.render: npm run render:main && npm run render:tour && npm run render:short
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run inspect
